By signing in or creating an account, some fields will auto-populate with your information.
The following form may request personally identifiable or protected health information. Please see our Privacy Policy for details. This form is encrypted. SSL is on to ensure a higher level of security. A recaptcha must be completed before submission, you cannot save progress, and you cannot receive an email copy of the form.

Job Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

  • Application Requirements

    4. Continue

    Application for Employment

    2. Any employment offer is conditional upon a negative test result for illegal drugs.
    6. Employment Desired*
    26. Continue |Go Back

    Questions

    2. Are you at least 18 years of age (or 21 years of age if applying for a law enforcement position)?*
    4. If you are applying for a law enforcement position, are you a certified police officer?*
    6. Are you a U.S. citizen, or are you otherwise authorized to work in the U.S. without any restriction?*
    8. Have you ever been convicted of or pled guilty or no contest to any crime other than a minor traffic violation? (A “Yes” answer does not necessarily disqualify an applicant.)*
    12. Have you ever been involuntarily terminated or asked to resign from any position of employment? (A “Yes” answer does not necessarily disqualify an applicant.)*
    16. Are you related to any City Council member or City employee?*

      The City's Anti-Nepotism policy states, "Two or more members of an immediate family may not be employed within the same department. […] Immediate family includes spouse, parent, child, grandparent, grandchild, brother, sister, aunt, uncle, niece, nephew, parent-in-law, grandparent-in-law, son-in-law, daughter-in-law, brother-in-law, and sister-in-law. Step-relatives are considered family members under this policy." (Note: Unrelated employees residing together in an apparently romantic relationship will be treated as being within the immediate family of each other for the purposes of this policy.)

    20. Is the driver's license you possess valid?*
    22. What type of driver's license do you possess?*
    25. Have you had any accidents during the past three years? (A “Yes” answer does not necessarily disqualify an applicant.)*
    29. Have you had any moving violations during the past three years? (A “Yes” answer does not necessarily disqualify an applicant.) *
    33. Have you ever served in the Armed Forces?*
    37. Continue |Go Back

    Skills

    2. List applicable skills or experience with computers, office machines, heavy equipment, etc.
    4. Computer Software*
    7. Office Machine/Office Skills*
    10. Heavy Equipment*
    13. Other Skills*

    16. Summarize any additional qualifications for the position for which you are applying.

    18. Continue |Go Back

    Education

    2. Reminder

      A high school diploma - or GED equivalent - is required for all City positions. Please complete all that apply.

    10. Did You Graduate?*
    12. Do you possess a High School Diploma or GED Certificate?*
    20. Did you Graduate?
    22. Degree Type
    31. Did you Graduate?
    33. Degree Type
    42. Did you Graduate?
    44. Degree Type
    47. Continue |Go Back

    Work Experience

    2. Please list the last four positions you held, beginning with the most recent.
    14. If the employer is your current or last employer, may we contact them?*
    77. Continue |Go Back

    References

    2. Reminder

      Please list at least two references familiar with your work-related abilities. Do not include relatives.

    37. Continue |Go Back

    Equal Opportunity Employer

    2. The City of Lancaster is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer.

      We adhere to a policy of making employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, age, or disability. Your opportunity for employment with this City depends solely on your qualifications.

    4. Please indicate you have read the following information*
    6. Continue |Go Back

    Resume/Additional Information

    2. Attach a current resume or additional information if desired.

      Applicants are encouraged to attach a current resume, if available, and may attach additional information if desired

    7. Did you attach a resume or additional information?*
    9. Continue |Go Back

    Applicant's Application Certification

    2. Please read carefully.

      In exchange for the consideration of my job application by the City of Lancaster (hereinafter called “City”), I agree that:

      Neither the acceptance of this application nor subsequent entry into any type of employment relationship, either in the position applied for nor any other position, nor the contents of employee handbooks, manuals, benefits plans, or policy statements shall serve to create an actual or implied contract of employment. Likewise, no such circumstances or documents shall confer any right to remain an employee of the City or to change in any respect the employment-at-will relationship between the City and the undersigned. Both the undersigned and the City may end the employment relationship at any time, without specified notice or reason. If employed, I understand that the City may unilaterally change or revise their benefits, policies, and procedures and such changes may include reduction in benefits.

      I authorize investigation of all statements contained in this application. I understand that the misrepresentation or omission of facts called for is cause for dismissal at any time without prior notice. I hereby give the City permission to contact schools, previous employers (unless otherwise indicated), references, and others, and hereby release the City from any liability as a result of such contact.

      I understand that any offer of employment with the City is conditional on the following and that the City’s findings with regard to any such condition may result in withdrawal of the employment offer.

      9. All positions – A negative test result for illegal or unauthorized drugs.

      10. All positions – Completion of a medical history questionnaire.

      11. All positions – Results of a driver history inquiry.

      12. All positions – Results of a criminal history inquiry.

      13. Positions designated by Administrator – Results of a credit history inquiry.

      14. Police and Fire positions – Results of a medical examination.

      15. Law enforcement positions:

      a. Certification regarding domestic violence conviction or restraining order in connection with firearm possession.

      b. Physical Abilities Test

      c. Psychological Stability Assessment

    4. Consent

      I hereby consent to investigation by the City in connection with the above conditions and authorize release by appropriate sources of information related thereto. I understand that I will not be considered for employment if I am unwilling to sign the authorization form for the employment physical and drug testing.

    9. Equal Employment Opportunity Statement

      The City of Lancaster is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We adhere to a policy of making employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, age, or disability. Your opportunity for employment with this City depends solely on your qualifications.

    11. This application will remain active for only 90 days from the date above.

      If after 90 days you wish to be considered for an available position, you will need to submit a new application. Any person requiring special accommodations should contact Human Resources at least 24 hours prior to any scheduled meeting.

      12. Leave This Blank:

    12. Submit | Go Back
